summary: Iteration 7 Testing Complete - All 27 backend tests passed, all 9 frontend tests passed. New features working: Document Verification (upload, admin review, approve/reject), IVA Toggle (admin enable/disable at 14%), Partner Menu Management (CRUD with auto-restaurant creation), Partner Order Management (status updates with customer notifications), Sales Reports (day/week/month with IVA calculation), Referral System (unique codes, apply code, coupons).

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/partners/documents/upload - uploads document (base64) for review, status=pendente
✅ GET /api/partners/documents - lists partner documents without file_data (security)
✅ GET /api/admin/documents/pending - lists pending documents for admin with partner business_name
✅ POST /api/admin/documents/{doc_id}/review - approve document, status=aprovado
✅ POST /api/admin/documents/{doc_id}/review - reject document with reason, status=rejeitado
✅ Invalid doc_type rejected (400 error)
✅ GET /api/admin/iva-settings - returns enabled=true, rate=14.0
✅ PUT /api/admin/iva-settings - toggle IVA on/off with custom rate
✅ GET /api/settings/iva - public IVA settings for checkout
✅ GET /api/partners/menu-items - auto-creates restaurant, returns menu items
✅ POST /api/partners/menu-items - creates new menu item with available=true
✅ PUT /api/partners/menu-items/{id} - updates menu item (name, price, available)
✅ DELETE /api/partners/menu-items/{id} - deletes menu item
✅ GET /api/partners/incoming-orders - lists orders for partner's restaurant
✅ POST /api/orders - creates order for partner's restaurant (by second user)
✅ PATCH /api/partners/incoming-orders/{id} - updates order status (confirmado→preparando→a_caminho→entregue)
✅ GET /api/partners/incoming-orders?status=X - filters orders by status
✅ Invalid order status rejected (400 error)
✅ GET /api/admin/reports/sales?period=day - sales report with IVA calculation
✅ GET /api/admin/reports/sales?period=week - weekly sales report
✅ GET /api/admin/reports/sales?period=month - monthly sales report with data export
✅ GET /api/referral/my-code - generates/returns TUDO57HVMR code, stats, rewards
✅ Referral rewards: referrer=500Kz discount, referred=20% off first order
✅ GET /api/referral/my-referrals - lists referrals made by user
✅ GET /api/referral/my-coupons - lists user's coupons (1 active 500Kz)
✅ Cannot use own referral code (400 error)
✅ Invalid referral code rejected (404 error)
✅ Frontend: Partner Dashboard has Menu, Orders, Documents buttons
✅ Frontend: /partner/menu shows menu items with add/edit/delete/toggle buttons
✅ Frontend: /partner/orders shows incoming orders with status filter and update buttons
✅ Frontend: /partner/documents shows upload form and document list with statuses
✅ Frontend: /referral shows code TUDO57HVMR, stats, apply form, coupons
✅ Frontend: Dashboard has 'Convidar Amigos' referral link
critical_code_review_comments: Document upload correctly excludes file_data from GET listings (security)
IVA is correctly applied to orders when enabled (14%)
Order total now includes IVA amount when IVA is enabled
Referral code format: TUDO + 6 alphanumeric chars (TUDO57HVMR)
Partner restaurant auto-created when accessing menu items

regular_user.note: Used for order creation and referral testing

seed_data_creation: Multiple test documents uploaded (BI, NIF), test menu items created, test order created by second user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 fully tested. Document verification: partner uploads base64 docs, admin approves/rejects. IVA at 14% enabled via admin toggle. Partner restaurant auto-created for 'Test Partner Luanda' with 2 menu items (Muamba de Galinha 3500Kz, Updated Test Item 2000Kz unavailable). 1 incoming order (8480 Kz with IVA) in 'A Preparar' status. Referral code TUDO57HVMR has 1 successful referral, user has 1 active 500Kz coupon. amigo@tudoaqui.ao already used a referral code. Bank accounts are EXAMPLE DATA. Driver assignment is SIMULATED.

mocked_apis.note: Bank accounts are example data. Driver assignment is simulated.

document_verification.upload: Partner uploads BI/NIF/Alvará as base64, stored with status=pendente
document_verification.listing: file_data excluded from listings for security
document_verification.admin_review: Admin can approve/reject with optional reason

iva_toggle.admin_control: CEO can enable/disable IVA and set rate (currently 14%)
iva_toggle.checkout_integration: Orders include IVA amount when enabled

partner_menu.auto_restaurant: Restaurant auto-created on first menu access

partner_orders.incoming: Partner sees orders for their restaurant

sales_reports.iva_calculation: IVA amount calculated based on enabled rate
sales_reports.data_export: Orders and payments data included for export

referral_system.coupons: Coupons created for both users on apply
